pr.title: Sequential TTT + Global Cosine Schedule + Memorization Analysis (val_bpb=1.0028, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: Global cosine TTT with per-layer LR multipliers and memorization diagnostics stabilizes five-epoch adaptation while logging sliding BPB.
techniques: Global cosine LR decay across all TTT epochs
Per-layer LR multipliers giving later layers higher adaptation rates
Sliding-window memorization diagnostic on adapted weights
